mortality_trends.help: IMR = Infant Mortality Rate per 1,000 live births. U5MR = Under-5 Mortality Rate. Neonatal = deaths in first 28 days.

nutrition.help: Stunting (chronic undernutrition) declining. Wasting (acute) stagnant. Overweight rising — double burden of malnutrition.

immunization.help: Full immunization = received BCG + 3 doses Pentavalent + 3 doses Polio + Measles. COVID-19 disrupted vaccination in 2020-21.

anemia.help: Despite decline, anaemia in children remains high. Iron supplementation, dietary diversity, and deworming programs are key interventions.

health_infrastructure.help: TN has one of India's strongest public health networks. CHC = Community Health Centre (30-bedded). PHC = Primary Health Centre.
health_infrastructure.source: NHM Annual Report 2022-23, TN Health & FW Dept

health_expenditure.help: TN health expenditure as % GSDP is below WHO recommended 2.5% but higher than national average ~1.5%.

schemes.name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance (CMCHIS)
schemes.desc: ₹5 lakh annual cover per family for 1,015+ surgeries in empanelled hospitals

schemes.name: Makkalai Thedi Maruthuvam
schemes.desc: Doorstep medical services reducing out-of-pocket expenditure

schemes.name: Kalaignar Maruthuvam Thittam
schemes.desc: Free medical education expansion and rural posting incentives

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu Medical Services Corporation
schemes.desc: Centralised procurement ensuring availability of 550+ essential medicines free in govt hospitals
